name: Kimchi Taco Co.
title: Food truck
summary: A mobile-first food-truck site whose centerpiece is a weekly schedule that auto-highlights where the truck is parked today, with one-tap map directions and a live "we're here now" banner.
setup_questions: What's the truck's name and cuisine / signature item?
What are 3–5 menu items with prices?
Where will you be each day this week (day, place, hours)?
Instagram handle and a catering contact email?
photo_terms: colorful food truck street parked daytime
korean bbq beef tacos kimchi close up
food truck service window customers line
sections: Hero with truck photo and a live 'We're at … today' banner
This week's schedule (day → location → time), today's row highlighted via JS
Menu (tacos, burritos, sides, drinks) with prices
Catering / private event inquiry blurb with form
Footer with contact and follow links
based_on: A Korean-Mexican fusion taco truck in the lineage of Kogi BBQ (LA) and Seoul Taco — bulgogi and kimchi tacos, a roaming weekly schedule, heavy Instagram presence.
